title: Rich Dense Egyptian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty, keto-friendly Egyptian lamb stew made with brandy and pressure-cooked to perfection. This dish is perfect for meal prep and can be served for dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in the pressure cooker over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the brandy and cook until the liquid is almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes.
Add the lamb broth and bring to a boil.
Close the lid of the pressure cooker and cook at high pressure for 30 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
